skills.name: Frozen Orb
skills.description:
Launches an icy orb that spirals
out frost shards in all directions.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description:
Fires a bolt of lightning that
bounces between nearby enemies.

skills.name: Blood Nova
skills.description:
Sacrifices health to unleash a
devastating ring of blood energy.

skills.name: Meteor Strike
skills.description:
Calls down a massive meteor that
scorches the ground on impact.

skills.name: Phase Dash
skills.description:
Teleports forward through enemies,
damaging all in the corridor.

skills.name: Cleave
skills.description:
Sweeps a wide melee arc, healing you
for 5% of its damage per enemy hit.

skills.name: Thunderclap
skills.description:
Ground stomp that damages, stuns and
slows foes, leaving a burning zone.

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description:
War shout: stuns nearby enemies for 2s,
speeds you up and empowers allies.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description:
Spins in place, striking every enemy
around you at once.

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description:
Slams the ground for damage around you,
knocking every nearby enemy back.

skills.name: Multi-Shot
skills.description:
Fires five arrows at once in a
wide horizontal fan.

skills.name: Rain of Arrows
skills.description:
Instantly showers arrows on the point
you aim at, hitting everything in it.

skills.name: Poison Arrow
skills.description:
Fires an arrow that poisons its
target, damaging it over time.

skills.name: Shadow Shot
skills.description:
Instant long-range shot that strikes
the first enemy in your crosshair.

skills.name: Volley
skills.description:
Rains 80 arrows in four waves over
the zone you aim at.

skills.name: Piercing Shot
skills.description:
Pierces every enemy in a line and
leaves them bleeding for 3s.

skills.name: Barrage
skills.description:
Unleashes ten arrows in a rapid,
tight forward spread.

skills.name: Mark Prey
skills.description:
Marks the enemy you aim at - it takes
double damage until the mark fades.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description:
Lobs an arcing fireball that explodes
on impact, splashing nearby enemies.

skills.name: Knife Burst
skills.description:
Throws three fast knives in a
tight forward spread.

skills.name: Smoke Bomb
skills.description:
Drops a toxic cloud that poisons foes
and breaks their aggro. Cloaks you 2s.

skills.name: Shadow Strike
skills.description:
Blinks behind the nearest enemy and
strikes its back for triple damage.

skills.name: Fan of Knives
skills.description:
Hurls a storm of knives in every
direction around you.

skills.name: Shadow Step
skills.description:
Blinks behind a visible enemy and
strikes - 3x from stealth. Cloaks you.

skills.name: Shadow Dance
skills.description:
Cloaks you: double weapon damage and
+20% speed. Kills extend it by 0.3s.

skills.name: Holy Smite
skills.description:
Dashes into the first enemy ahead and
smites it with a pillar that heals you.

skills.name: Consecration
skills.description:
Consecrates the ground: holy pillars
rain on enemies inside, healing you.

skills.name: Divine Shield
skills.description:
Cleanses you, heals, and grants 1.5s
invulnerability. Stuns and smites foes.

skills.name: Holy Bombardment
skills.description:
Marks a zone where holy pillars rain
on enemies. Each hit heals you.

skills.name: Holy Nova
skills.description:
Bursts holy light around you, damaging
enemies twice and healing allies.

skills.name: Divine Judgment
skills.description:
Cleanses, heals and shields you, then
calls 3 pillars down on nearby foes.

skills.name: Shock Bolt
skills.description:
Fires a trio of electric bolts that
slow and stagger what they hit.

skills.name: Deploy Turret
skills.description:
Deploys a mobile turret bot that
follows you and shoots enemies.

skills.name: Tesla Coil
skills.description:
Discharges lightning around you,
zapping and staggering nearby foes.

skills.name: Mech Overdrive
skills.description:
Restores health, clears slows and
freezes, and boosts your move speed.

skills.name: Aimed Shot
skills.description:
Fires a piercing rail through every
enemy in a line, slowing them all.

skills.name: Explosive Round
skills.description:
Hitscan round that detonates on impact,
blasting and knocking back nearby foes.

skills.name: Rapid Fire
skills.description:
Overcharges your gun: the next 5 shots
deal 3x damage and pierce enemies.

skills.name: Overcharged Magazine
skills.description:
Supercharges your magazine - the next
5 shots deal 3x damage and pierce.

skills.name: Headshot
skills.description:
Precision shot that instantly executes
foes under 25% HP, chaining to nearby.

skills.name: Combat Drone
skills.description:
Deploys a spider drone that fights
at your side.

skills.name: Swarm Drones
skills.description:
Releases two flying drones that
harry nearby enemies.

skills.name: Stun Grenade
skills.description:
Lobs an arcing grenade that explodes
on impact, stunning nearby foes.

skills.name: Swarm Deploy
skills.description:
Deploys three spider drones and three
flying drones at once.

skills.name: Overclock
skills.description:
Overclocks your drones: double damage
and +50% speed while it lasts.

skills.name: Detonate Swarm
skills.description:
Every drone you control explodes,
blasting enemies around it, then dies.

skills.name: Swarm Queen
skills.description:
Summons a tough queen drone that
spawns a new mini drone every 2s.

skills.name: Void Zone
skills.description:
5% on hit: dark void zone dealing
flat damage + 60% missing HP.

skills.name: Shadow Ricochet
skills.description:
30% on hit: two shadow bolts seek
nearby enemies. Can chain again.

skills.name: Deflect
skills.description:
Briefly absorbs all damage, then
erupts it back as a blast and bolts.

skills.name: Exploit Weakness
skills.description:
Marks enemies near your aim for bonus
damage. Killing one resets the cooldown.

skills.name: Adrenaline Surge
skills.description:
Passive: dodge through an attack to
gain +10% attack speed for 4s. Stacks.

skills.name: Death's Dance
skills.description:
While active, every dodge-through
unleashes a slash at all foes near you.

skills.name: Frenzy
skills.description:
Each hit: +5% attack speed for 4s.
Stacks up to 6 times (+30%).

skills.name: Break Free
skills.description:
Shatter all crowd control on you and
become immune to control for 1.5s.
